title: Agents and Markdown
intro: Quick check on the definitions above.
feedbackIncorrect: Review the definitions — try again on the next page if needed.

questions.prompt: Which best describes an AI agent in this course’s sense?
choices: A system that perceives its environment, processes information, and acts autonomously toward goals
A human operator who only types prompts into a chat box
A database that stores training data for a model

questions.prompt: Why is Markdown especially useful in LLM and prompt workflows?
choices: It replaces the need for any programming language
It lets you structure prompts and documentation with simple markup that many tools render clearly
It is required for models to run on GPUs

questions.prompt: Which is characteristic of agent behavior as described?
choices: Actions stay fixed regardless of new data or feedback
The system can adapt what it does based on data, feedback, and changes in the environment
The system never receives input from outside itself
A compiled binary format for mobile apps
A lightweight markup language for formatting text with simple symbols
A protocol for encrypting API traffic
